question_text: Let {𝑋𝑛}𝑛≥1 be a sequence of independent and identically distributed random variables with mean 0 and variance 1, all of them defined on the same probability space. For 𝑛= 1, 2, 3, … , let 𝑌𝑛= 1 𝑛(𝑋1𝑋2 + 𝑋3𝑋4 + ⋯+ 𝑋2𝑛−1𝑋2𝑛). Then which of the following statements is/are true?

options.A: {√𝑛 𝑌𝑛}𝑛≥1 converges in distribution to a standard normal random variable
